name: Resistant Hypertension - Vital Signs Query (SBP > 140)
description: Tests ability to find uncontrolled HTN patients via the PheKB Type-2 criterion: elevated SBP >140 mmHg despite medical therapy. This is the vital-sign-only path — combined with multi-drug regimen, defines Type-2 resistant HTN.
prompt: Find patients with elevated systolic blood pressure measurements above 140 mmHg, suggesting uncontrolled hypertension.

prompts.naive: Find patients with high blood pressure.
prompts.broad: Find patients with systolic blood pressure (SBP) measurements above 140 mmHg, indicating uncontrolled hypertension despite treatment.
prompts.expert: Search Observation for LOINC 8480-6 (Systolic blood pressure) with value-quantity gt140 mmHg. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|8480-6&value-quantity=gt140

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with SBP >140 mmHg (PheKB Type-2 criterion).
